en: "Do you think this to be just? Do you say, 'It is my right before God,'
zh: “你說：‘我在 神面前更顯為義’， 你自以為這話有理嗎？

en: that you ask, 'What advantage have I? How am I better off than if I had sinned?'
zh: 你還說：‘你有甚麼益處呢？ 我不犯罪有甚麼好處？’

en: I will answer you and your friends with you.
zh: 我要用言語回答你， 和與你在一起的朋友。

en: Look at the heavens, and see; and behold the clouds, which are higher than you.
zh: 你要往天仰望觀看， 細看高過你的雲天。

en: If you have sinned, what do you accomplish against him? And if your transgressions are multiplied, what do you do to him?
zh: 你若犯罪，你能使 神受害嗎？ 你的過犯若增多，你又能使他受損嗎？

en: If you are righteous, what do you give to him? Or what does he receive from your hand?
zh: 你若為人正義，你能給他甚麼呢？ 他從你手裡能領受甚麼呢？

en: Your wickedness concerns a man like yourself, and your righteousness a son of man.
zh: 你的邪惡只能害像你的人， 你的公義也只能叫世人得益。

en: "Because of the multitude of oppressions people cry out; they call for help because of the arm of the mighty.
zh: 他們因多受欺壓而呼叫， 因受強權者的壓制而呼求。

en: But none says, 'Where is God my Maker, who gives songs in the night,
zh: 卻沒有說：‘ 神我的創造主在哪裡呢？ 他使人在夜間歌唱。

en: who teaches us more than the beasts of the earth and makes us wiser than the birds of the heavens?'
zh: 他教導我們過於教導地上的走獸， 使我們有智慧勝於空中的飛鳥。’

en: There they cry out, but he does not answer, because of the pride of evil men.
zh: 因為惡人驕傲的緣故， 他們在那裡呼求， 神卻不回答。

en: Surely God does not hear an empty cry, nor does the Almighty regard it.
zh: 真的， 神必不垂聽虛妄的呼求， 全能者也必不留意，

en: How much less when you say that you do not see him, that the case is before him, and you are waiting for him!
zh: 更何況你說你不得見他。 你的案件在他面前，你忍耐地等候他吧！

en: And now, because his anger does not punish, and he does not take much note of transgression,
zh: 但現在因為他還沒有在忿怒中降罰， 也不大理會人的過犯；

en: Job opens his mouth in empty talk; he multiplies words without knowledge."
zh: 所以約伯開口說空話， 多說無知識的話。”
